description: Set the IDE file tree state on the actual UI: expand/collapse a directory node, or select a file/directory. Blocks until the frontend completes the operation. Returns success or error message. Only directories support expand/collapse — files will silently succeed (no-op) for those operations.
name: set_ide_filetree_status

operate.description: "expand" — expand a directory in the file tree (only valid for directories). "collapse" — collapse a directory in the file tree (only valid for directories). "select" — select (highlight) a file or directory in the file tree.

target.description: Absolute path of the target file or directory in the file tree.
